descriptionParagraphs: The Storms Twin Turbo (T2) from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Exceptional Hold and Supreme Performance in small to medium conditions.

The Storms Twin Turbo (T2) was developed to deliver Exceptional Hold and Supreme Performance in small to medium conditions. Featuring a medium single concave that flows seamlessly into the 'Turbo Channel' that has been added to provide the Storms T2 with increased bite, drive and hold. The Storms T2 delivers projection through dead sections with an abundance of speed, allowing progressive modern surfing in smaller conditions. The Storms T2 offers added spark in waves under 4 ft.
We recommend riding the Storms T2, 2-4 inches shorter than your regular shortboard and adding a touch of width and thickness.

The E3-Lite epoxy glassing technology has been developed with leading composite material firms to develop custom carbon/Innegra tapes to produce incredible results with unmatched performance. E3 Epoxy tech features a super tight cell structured core, a stringer-less EPS blank, and a 4oz layer of fiberglass on the bottom combined with a custom Innegra/carbon tape. The deck is layered with SharpEye's custom triple carbon tape with a layer of Bi-axle 4oz cloth. SharpEye's commitment to innovation and constant improvement has paid off with the E3 Lite technology. Zero Compromise.
